mapper.insert:
SELECT calendar_seq.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO calendar ( calendarno, memberno, adminno, title, category, description, start_date, end_date, start_time, end_time, alarm_yn, image, rdate ) VALUES ( #{calendarno}, #{memberno, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{adminno, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{title}, #{category}, #{description}, #{start_date}, #{end_date}, #{start_time}, #{end_time}, #{alarm_yn}, #{image, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT calendarno, memberno, adminno, title, category, description, alarm_yn, rdate, favorite_yn, start_date, end_date, image, thumbnail, start_time, end_time FROM calendar ORDER BY start_date ASC, start_time ASC

SELECT calendarno, memberno, adminno, title, category, description, alarm_yn, rdate, favorite_yn, start_date, end_date, image, thumbnail, start_time, end_time FROM calendar WHERE calendarno = #{calendarno}
mapper.update: UPDATE calendar SET title = #{title}, category = #{category}, description = #{description}, alarm_yn = #{alarm_yn}, rdate = sysdate, start_date = #{start_date}, end_date = #{end_date}, image = #{image, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, thumbnail = #{thumbnail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, start_time = #{start_time}, end_time = #{end_time} WHERE calendarno = #{calendarno}
mapper.select: SELECT calendarno, memberno, adminno, title, category, description, alarm_yn, rdate, favorite_yn, start_date, end_date, image, thumbnail, start_time, end_time FROM calendar WHERE adminno IS NOT NULL ORDER BY schedule_date ASC, schedule_time ASC

SELECT calendarno, memberno, adminno, title, category, description, alarm_yn, rdate, favorite_yn, start_date, end_date, image, thumbnail, start_time, end_time FROM calendar WHERE adminno IS NOT NULL OR memberno = #{memberno} ORDER BY schedule_date ASC, schedule_time ASC
